question: [File: 'File Name: pinger/mirror_node_client.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: buildNetworkFromMirrorNodes()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the URL construction (base + '/api/v1/network/nodes') by causing DNS for the mirror REST hostname to return a CNAME chain that eventually resolves to a slow server, causing every HTTP request to time out and the full retry-with-backoff sequence to run, delaying transaction submissions beyond the 500% block-time threshold?
